problem.customer_pain: Customers reserve items for in-store pickup, arrive, and the item is out of stock ~9% of the time. This breaks trust and drives 40k/mo support contacts.
problem.business_cost_today: $14.6M/yr revenue at risk from abandoned BOPIS orders + $1.8M/yr contact-center cost + 11 pt NPS drop among pickup users.

evidence.reference: Survey S-412: 73 responses citing 'item not there when I arrived'
Competitor A launched real-time store inventory Q4 2025 (teardown link)

why_now: Competitor A real-time inventory launch is converting our BOPIS customers (traffic study shows 6% share loss).
OMS v3 ships Q2 with the inventory API we need; window closes if we don't consume it.
Store associate union contract renegotiation Q4 — training changes must precede it.
proposed_solution: Surface real-time store-level inventory on PDP, cart, and checkout. Reserve picked items for 90 minutes with immediate inventory decrement. Notify store associates via Associate App when a reservation is created, and again when the customer arrives. Gracefully degrade to 'check availability in-store' when OMS is unreachable so browse is never blocked.

target_audience.segment: Loyalty Tier-2 + Tier-3 shoppers within 25 mi of a store
target_audience.why_they_matter: 54% of BOPIS revenue; highest retention tier
Fulfillment quality directly drives customer NPS

in_scope: Real-time store inventory on PDP, cart, and checkout across web/iOS/Android
Loyalty points accrual at pickup completion
out_of_scope: Locker hardware deployment (hardware RFP in flight)

primary.metric: BOPIS fulfillment rate (reserved → picked up successfully)
BOPIS attach rate on PDP sessions within 25mi of a store

guardrails: PDP p95 load time must not regress beyond 2.2s
Store NPS (BOPIS segment) must not drop from current 47
Refund rate must not increase > 0.2 pt

phases.exit_criteria: Arch review passed, OMS contract signed off
Guardrails green, fulfillment rate ≥ 95% in pilot

top_risks.risk: OMS v3 inventory API slips past Q2 week 6
top_risks.mitigation: Weekly sync with OMS PM; fallback plan to cache + polling in V1.1
Data audit + shrinkage compensation + 30s staleness flag

top_risks.risk: Store associate training not ready before pilot
top_risks.mitigation: Training plan locked in discovery phase; e-learning shipped Q2 week 10

open_questions: Do we reserve inventory before payment auth or after? (leaning: reserve → auth → confirm)
Kiosk QR: device-generated or server-generated token?
